nav.spatialCanvasDesc: Infinite vector grids for dynamic block orchestration and infinite workflow mapping.
nav.realTimeSyncDesc: Zero-latency background data streaming utilizing advanced PostgreSQL primitives.

hero.subtitle: Manage your projects, design your custom workflow with dynamic blocks, and organize your team in seconds with role-based access.

ai.desc: Meet your context-aware AI assistant. Our built-in RAG engine reads your active blocks in real-time. Ask questions, summarize projects, or use the Generative Wand to let AI structure your thoughts instantly.
ai.chatQ: Summarize the Q3 Roadmap items on my canvas.
ai.chatA1: Based on your current canvas, the Q3 Roadmap focuses on:
ai.chatA5: Should I generate a timeline block for these?

features.title: Everything you need, out of the box.
features.subtitle: No complex setups, just focus on your work.
features.f1Desc: Drag and drop text, dates, and form fields to shape your projects exactly how you want them.
features.f2Desc: Admins see everything, while your team sees only what they need to. Perfect workspace security.
features.f3Desc: Everything is saved instantly in the background as you work. Never lose data again.
features.f4Desc: Invite specific teammates to view or edit individual projects without giving full workspace access.
features.f5Desc: Get real-time application alerts for project invites and role updates right in your dashboard.
features.f6Desc: Store complex custom data structures securely with lightning-fast PostgreSQL JSONB queries.

architecture.desc: SaaS Engine isn't just another wrapper. It's built from the ground up using a modern, scalable, and secure technology stack designed for real-world performance.
architecture.d1: Lightning-fast React rendering on the edge, combined with Zustand for zero-lag synchronous state management across your canvas.
architecture.dd1: Server Actions integration ensures instant data mutations with zero client-side waterfall requests.
architecture.d2: High-performance asynchronous backend architecture to handle complex RAG pipelines and heavy data processing instantly.
architecture.dd2: Utilizes async endpoints to seamlessly manage thousands of concurrent WebSocket streams for AI tasks.
architecture.d3: State-of-the-art open-weight AI models providing real-time, context-aware generations directly inside your workspace.
architecture.dd3: Inference running at 800+ tokens per second. Fully contextualized with your active canvas elements.
architecture.d4: Dynamic canvas data stored seamlessly in JSONB structures, backed by Row Level Security (RLS) for strict multi-tenant isolation.
architecture.dd4: Native vector embeddings and real-time subscriptions enabled on all core tables for instant client updates.
architecture.d5: Enterprise-grade application performance monitoring and error tracking ensuring 99.99% uptime and immediate bug resolution.
architecture.dd5: End-to-end distributed tracing connects Next.js frontend actions directly to Python backend queries.
architecture.d6: Fully containerized infrastructure allowing consistent deployments and extreme scalability across any cloud environment.
architecture.dd6: Multi-stage builds drastically reduce image sizes. 100% prepared for Kubernetes (K8s) auto-scaling clusters.

anatomy.desc: No clutter, just pure productivity. We designed the interface to keep your focus exactly where it belongs: on your work. The canvas dynamically adapts to what you need.
anatomy.f1Desc: Switch seamlessly between Canvas, Kanban, and Timeline views without losing your context.
anatomy.f2Desc: Your context-aware AI assistant is always ready in the sidebar to summarize or generate blocks.

promo.desc: Join the beta now and get lifetime access to the Llama 3.3 RAG engine, unlimited dynamic blocks, and priority support. No credit card required for the first 14 days.

personal.desc1: You don't need a company to harness the power of our platform. Turn your workspace into a
personal.desc2: . Organize your studies, plan your freelance projects, or track your daily life with the same enterprise-grade tools.
personal.d1: Drop your notes onto the canvas and let our AI instantly quiz you or summarize complex chapters.
personal.d2: Manage multiple clients, project timelines, and workflows in beautifully isolated personal workspaces.
personal.d3: Build your custom habit trackers, fitness logs, and travel itineraries with dynamic check-blocks and date widgets. Make it truly yours.

cta.title: Ready to start the engine?
cta.desc: No credit card required. Set up your workspace and invite your team in seconds. Join the revolution.

Footer.description: The ultimate operating system for your company. Build, manage, and scale your workflows with absolute precision.

FeaturesPage.title: Built for scale. Designed for speed.
FeaturesPage.subtitle: Discover the powerful tools that make SaaS Engine the ultimate operating system for your company.

canvas.title: Infinite Spatial Canvas
canvas.desc: Break free from linear documents. Drag, drop, and connect text, images, databases, and kanban boards on an infinite vector grid.

realtime.title: Zero-Latency Real-Time Sync
realtime.desc: Every keystroke, every block movement is synchronized instantly across your entire team using our advanced WebSocket architecture.

security.title: Enterprise-Grade RBAC
security.desc: Granular role-based access control. Define exactly who can view, edit, or manage specific projects and workspace settings.

ai.title: Context-Aware AI
ai.desc: Chat with your canvas. Our built-in Llama 3.3 engine reads your blocks and helps you brainstorm, summarize, and generate content.
